name: Sauteed Chicken Livers
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Livers, chicken, cut into bite size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute chicken livers in butter for 5 minutes or until brown.
2. Remove the livers and drain on paper towels, reserving the drippings in the skillet.
3. Saute mushrooms and onion in the reserved drippings until the onions are golden.
4. Stir in flour and salt.
5. Add tomatoes, wine, parsley, and Worcestershire sauce; bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat and cook for 5 minutes, stirring often.
7. Add the chicken livers and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
8. Serve over hot cooked rice.
